mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate transmits immediate discount-rate relief to equities, lifting S&P 500 returns over the next month when the policy path is still easing and inflation is not re-accelerating.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is down from its prior 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if 20d SPX returns are not positive in a majority of easing-rate episodes, or if the signal loses predictive sign when CPIAUCSL is flat-to-decelerating.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income and future earnings, so S&P 500 forward returns turn negative over the next month once unemployment breaks above a recent local floor.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3pp from its 3-month low
failure_condition: Reject if threshold-crossing unemployment episodes are followed by positive 20d SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the sign flips when PAYEMS is not deteriorating.

mechanism_narrative: Stronger retail sales growth in RSAFS reflects resilient final demand and supports equity earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when sales are accelerating from trend.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS is above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if periods with RSAFS above trend do not outperform baseline on 20d SPX returns, or if the effect disappears when GDPC1 growth is positive.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO confirms broad output growth and better utilization, which improves near-term earnings expectations and supports positive S&P 500 returns over a 20-day horizon.
failure_condition: Reject if the sign of the 20d return is not positive on average after INDPRO upswings, or if the rank relationship is indistinguishable from zero over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising HOUST and improving RSAFS signals synchronized housing and consumer demand, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter through stronger revenue expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal is not stronger than either proxy alone, or if positive 60d returns do not follow synchronized HOUST-RSAFS strength more often than chance.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is above 4.5% and CPIAUCSL is still rising, tighter real financing conditions compress valuation multiples and S&P 500 forward returns turn negative over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate inflationary episodes are followed by positive 20d SPX returns in more than half of cases, or if the joint condition does not outperform a simple FEDFUNDS-only rule.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE after a prior PAYEMS slowdown identifies an employment deterioration regime that should depress S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as recession risk rises.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Reject if consecutive unemployment increases fail to predict negative 60d returns, or if the effect is absent when PAYEMS has already weakened for at least 2 months.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-shock recovery, accelerating INDPRO together with rising HOUST indicates supply-side normalization and future margin stabilization, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-HOUST recovery signal does not predict positive 20d returns better than either series alone, or if it performs negatively in recovery windows.
